items.briefing:
Australia's communications regulator ACMA has outlined its 2026–27 compliance priorities with a focus on consumer protection, signalling increased scrutiny of organisations that handle customer data and communications. Separately, cybersecurity researchers have flagged a growing trend of attackers targeting education technology *suppliers* rather than schools directly — a reminder that third-party software providers can be a weak link for registered training organisations like ours.

Scam operations linked to Southeast Asian criminal networks continue to operate with local law enforcement complications, meaning Australians remain at elevated risk of sophisticated scams. **Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected message or call claiming to be from a supplier or software vendor, verify it through an official contact number before clicking any links or sharing information.

featured.title: In AI, control is the real advantage
featured.quote: Australian firms risk losing AI advantage if core models and pricing remain offshore.
